use_cases: Hero section backgrounds for tech and developer-focused landing pages
SaaS product showcases with futuristic cyberpunk aesthetic
Gaming and creator tools landing pages requiring animated visual impact
Dark-themed website sections needing atmospheric depth
ai_summary: A cyberpunk-style animated hero background component featuring randomly generated light beams rising from a perspective grid floor with synchronized fade animations. The dark aesthetic with neon glow effects creates an immersive tech atmosphere ideal for SaaS, dev tools, and gaming product landing pages.
